description_html:
Backend Breakdown – Offline Hackathon:

  • Mode: Offline (No internet or AI tools allowed)
  • Duration: 90 minutes
  • Team Size: Solo or teams of up to 2 members

Event Overview:
Backend Breakdown is a hands-on technical hackathon focused on debugging and restoring backend systems under strict time constraints. The event is designed to test practical backend engineering skills in a real-world simulation environment.

Participants will receive:

  • A partially broken backend project
  • Frontend files
  • A pre-configured local database

The goal is to identify bugs, fix misconfigurations, resolve server issues, and make the backend fully functional within 90 minutes.

Key Highlights:

  • Fully offline environment
  • No internet access
  • No AI tools permitted
  • Only reference materials provided by organizers can be used

Judging Criteria:

  • Successful server execution
  • API correctness and response handling
  • Proper database operations
  • Configuration fixes
  • Code quality and structure
location: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing (IIITDM) Kancheepuram
